asset.title: App Variance Fill
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The preview clearly demonstrates automated variance calculation in a financial spreadsheet using collaborative agents, supported by a real-time trace log.

featureClarity.evidence: The UI clearly shows the transition from empty variance cells to populated percentage calculations.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the entire sequence: initiating collaboration, agent locking, computation, and final merging.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode interface with clear visual hierarchy, though the bottom trace log is slightly dense.

consistency.evidence: Perfectly aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of spreadsheets, multi-agent execution, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Authentic UI capture showing real-time state changes and version increments.

legibility.evidence: Main spreadsheet is highly legible, though trace log text at the bottom requires close attention.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Directly applicable to financial analysts and operations teams looking to automate reconciliation.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the step-by-step latency and agent coordination process.

observedEvidence: Agent locking indicators on variance cells
Version increments from v1 to v5

defects.observed: The trace log text at the bottom is small and dense, making it slightly hard to read on smaller screens.
defects.fix: Increase the font size of the trace log or provide a zoomed-in view of the log updates.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom agents collaborate to automatically calculate and merge variance metrics directly within your financial model.
